message:
fix(abi): un-export setjmp family, add condvar magic routing, randomize stack canary, and prefer host threading

setjmp/sigsetjmp/_setjmp must save the caller's CPU context and cannot
work through a function-pointer trampoline — remove their no_mangle
exports and drop them from libc.map (longjmp/siglongjmp are fine since
they never return).

Add MANAGED_CONDVAR_MAGIC (0x4743_5658 "GCVX") sentinel to CondvarData
so the ABI layer can distinguish native condvars from host-initialized
ones. Condvar destroy/signal/broadcast/wait/timedwait now check the
magic field and route unmanaged condvars to the host, preventing
double-handling. Mixed managed-condvar + host-mutex pairs are rejected
with EINVAL. All condvar core operations now validate is_initialized()
before proceeding.

Always prefer host delegation for mutex_init and cond_init even when
attrs are non-null — programs like Python 3.13 pass CLOCK_MONOTONIC
condattrs and specific mutex types that the native impl may not fully
support. Delegate pthread_create/join/detach to host for correct TLS
setup and stack guard pages.

Initialize __libc_single_threaded to 1 (glibc convention: single-threaded
at startup, cleared to 0 on first pthread_create). Randomize
__stack_chk_guard from AT_RANDOM at startup instead of using a static
canary value, with NUL low byte per glibc convention. Update membrane
build.rs expected_sites count for new condvar Ordering sites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -747,7 +747,7 @@ const MEMORY_MODEL_SOURCES: &[MemoryModelSource] = &[
     MemoryModelSource {
         relative_path: "../frankenlibc-core/src/pthread/cond.rs",
         domain: "futex",
-        expected_sites: 29,
+        expected_sites: 33,
         stop_at_cfg_test: true,
         optional: true, // Cross-crate: skip gracefully for standalone builds
     },
